description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a cylindrical body and a long neck, standing upright on a round wooden table. The bottle is predominantly a matte reddish-pink color, with a white rectangular label featuring red text and a red graphic element. The neck of the bottle is slightly tapered, leading to a cap that matches the body color. The surface of the bottle appears smooth and hard, with no visible signs of wear or damage. The bottle is likely made of glass, commonly used for beverages such as wine, and is sealed with a cap that is not visibly detailed.
description: A tall, matte reddish-pink bottle with a white label and a matching cap, standing on a round wooden table. The bottle has a smooth, hard surface and a slender neck.
description_view_0: The bottle's front label is clearly visible, showing red text and a graphic on a white background.
description_view_1: The bottle is seen from the back, with no label visible and the smooth reddish-pink surface dominating.
description_view_2: A side view of the bottle, with the label barely visible on the left edge and the bottle's cylindrical shape prominent.
description_view_3: The label is partially visible, showing some red text and graphics on the right side of the bottle.
attribute_label_or_branding: White rectangular label with red text and a red graphic, placed on the front of the bottle.
